exams.title: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals
exams.description: Foundational knowledge of cloud concepts, Azure services, security, privacy, compliance, and pricing.

exams.title: Microsoft Azure Administrator
exams.description: Practical skills for implementing, managing, and monitoring core Azure services.

exams.title: Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure
exams.description: Skills for designing, building, testing, deploying, and maintaining cloud-native applications on Azure.

exams.title: Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions
exams.description: Expertise in designing cloud and hybrid solutions for identity, governance, data storage, business continuity, and infrastructure.

exams.title: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions
exams.description: Expertise in designing and implementing DevOps practices for version control, compliance, infrastructure as code, and CI/CD.

exams.title: Microsoft Azure Security Technologies
exams.description: Expertise in implementing security controls, managing identity and access, and protecting data, applications, and networks in Azure.

exams.title: Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals
exams.description: Foundational knowledge of core data concepts and Azure data services including relational and non-relational data.

exams.title: Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals
exams.description: Foundational knowledge of machine learning and AI concepts, and related Azure services for AI workloads.

exams.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
exams.description: Foundational knowledge of AWS Cloud concepts, services, security, architecture, pricing, and support.

exams.title: AWS Certified AI Practitioner
exams.description: Foundational knowledge of AI/ML concepts, AWS AI services, responsible AI practices, and the ML lifecycle.

exams.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
exams.description: Ability to design resilient, high-performing, secure, and cost-optimized architectures on AWS.

exams.title: AWS Certified Developer - Associate
exams.description: Ability to develop, deploy, and debug cloud-based applications using AWS services and best practices.

exams.title: AWS Certified SysOps Administrator - Associate
exams.description: Ability to deploy, manage, and operate scalable, highly available, and fault-tolerant systems on AWS.

exams.title: AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate
exams.description: Expertise in designing, building, and managing data processing systems on AWS, including data pipelines and analytics.

exams.title: AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer - Associate
exams.description: Expertise in building, training, tuning, and deploying machine learning models on AWS using SageMaker.

exams.title: Google Cloud Fundamentals: Core Infrastructure
exams.description: Introductory overview of Google Cloud services, infrastructure, and core concepts.

exams.title: Cloud Computing and GCP Fundamentals
exams.description: Cloud computing fundamentals covering IaaS/PaaS/SaaS, cloud benefits, GCP resource hierarchy, and core services.

exams.title: Associate Cloud Engineer
exams.description: Deploying applications, monitoring operations, and managing enterprise solutions on Google Cloud.
categories: Setting Up a Cloud Solution Environment
Planning and Configuring a Cloud Solution
Deploying and Implementing a Cloud Solution
Ensuring Successful Operation of a Cloud Solution

exams.title: Exam Prep: Associate Cloud Engineer
exams.description: Certification preparation covering cloud solution setup, deployment, operations, and security on Google Cloud.

exams.title: Professional Cloud Architect
exams.description: Designing and planning cloud solution architecture, managing implementation, and ensuring security and compliance.

exams.title: GCP: Compute Services
exams.description: Compute Engine, App Engine, Cloud Functions, Cloud Run, GKE, instance groups, autoscaling, and GPUs/TPUs.

exams.title: Networking in Google Cloud: Fundamentals
exams.description: VPC networks, subnets, firewall rules, load balancing, Cloud VPN, Cloud Interconnect, Cloud NAT, and Cloud DNS.

exams.title: GCP: Database and Storage
exams.description: Cloud SQL, Spanner, Firestore, Bigtable, Cloud Storage, Filestore, Persistent Disk, and AlloyDB.

exams.title: Data Engineering, Big Data, and Machine Learning on GCP
exams.description: BigQuery, Dataflow, Dataproc, Pub/Sub, Bigtable, Vertex AI, and machine learning on Google Cloud.

exams.title: Database, Big Data, and DevOps Services in GCP
exams.description: DevOps and data platform services including Cloud Build, BigQuery, Dataflow, Dataproc, Pub/Sub, and Cloud Composer.
